name: Classic Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté sliced onions in butter until soft.
2. Stir in flour to form a paste; pour in bourbon, stirring until smooth.
3. Gradually stir in broth; season with basil and simmer 30-40 minutes.
4. Drop a slice of toasted French bread into the bottom of each soup bowl.
5. Fill with onion soup and sprinkle with cheese.
6. Broil until cheese is golden and bubbly.
7. Serve immediately.
